chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-1539 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 3. For hearing of MA 13190/2016 19.10.2016. Syed Abbas Ali Jaffary, Advocate for the petitioner alongwith petitioner. Respondent No.1 present in person. -.-.-. This petition is disposed of on the Statement that the petitioner/tenant will hand over the demised premises to Mst. Fehmida the landlady by tomorrow at 01:00 p.m. under the supervision of the Bailiff of the Executing Court. Respondent No.1 Mst. Fehmida, the landlady, states that while handing over of possession the petitioner/tenant might take out the shutter of the shop. The petitioner undertakes not to remove shutter of the demised premises. Office is directed to send copy of this order to the Executing Court for taking necessary action. In the above terms this petition stands disposed of alongwith listed applications. JUDGE Ali Haider
